PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-04-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Louis Randolph Harris for (Petitioner) Timothy J. McDonnell.

The Court stated that it is still looking for a declaration or supporting statement identifying the trust beneficiaries. Mr. Harris responded that it was filed on 8/30/18 and presented a copy to the Court for review. The Court reviewed the document and let Mr. Harris know that filing a document on 8/30/18 does not get it to the Court in time for review. The Court granted the petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary and signed the order in open court. Status on close of estate is set for March 4, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Wu. (Not Reported)
